name: whatsapp-chat
title: WhatsApp Chat
description: WhatsApp chat content surface — authentic visual contract (teal #008069 header, #D9FDD3 outgoing bubbles, #ECE5DD background pattern) so the medium is instantly recognizable. Slots into iphone-chassis (immersive + wallpaper='none') for testimonial / lead-conversation embeds per af-brand-doctrine 'WhatsApp-as-trust-medium' pattern. Composable sub-parts exported: WhatsAppHeader, WhatsAppBubble, WhatsAppDaySeparator, WhatsAppTypingIndicator, WhatsAppInputBar, WhatsAppVoiceMessage. Receipt states (sent/delivered/read) + voice-message + typing indicator supported.
